found_specs.title: Payment Abstraction V2 Design Document (CLIPs: Conversion V2 DD) - 13-page specification covering Dutch auction model, price curve math, auction kick-off/termination logic, CowSwap EIP-1271 integration, Data Streams integration, AuctionBidder workflow, WorkflowRouter architecture, system parameters (FeedInfo, AssetParams), state variables, roles, and full sequence diagram

Chainlink Payment Abstraction Audit Catalyst (by Zellic) - Security-focused overview of FeeAggregator, BaseAuction, WorkflowRouter, PriceManager, AuctionBidder components with asset flow lifecycle and critical security focus areas (custody, economic correctness, callback risks)

C4 Audit README - Contest details ($65K prize pool), publicly known issues (non-canonical ERC20s, arbitrary deposits, async CowSwap order updates), scope table (13 files, 1060 nSLOC), trusted roles table, areas of concern (auction curve invariant, fund custody, rounding, DoS vectors)

Scope definition - 13 Solidity files in scope: AuctionBidder, BaseAuction, Caller, GPV2CompatibleAuction, PriceManager, WorkflowRouter, interfaces (IAuctionCallback, IBaseAuction, IGPV2CompatibleAuction, IGPV2Settlement, IPriceManager), libraries (Errors, Roles)
Out of scope definition - 72 files excluded: EmergencyWithdrawer, FeeAggregator, LinkReceiver, NativeTokenReceiver, PausableWithAccessControl, vendor CoW Protocol contracts, all test files
V12 (Zellic AI) Automated Audit Findings - All V12 findings are out of scope and ineligible for awards (JS-rendered page, content not extractable via static fetch)
Sponsor README - Build/test instructions, references Payment Abstraction V1 repo (smartcontractkit/payment-abstraction)
Payment Abstraction V1 (predecessor) - Original system using Uniswap V3 for swaps, includes payment_abstraction_v0.1.pdf whitepaper
Chainlink Automation Documentation - checkUpkeep/performUpkeep pattern reference (automation infrastructure is out of scope but pattern is used in BaseAuction)
Chainlink Automation Compatible Contracts Guide - Technical details on implementing checkUpkeep and performUpkeep functions
Chainlink Data Streams Documentation - High-frequency low-latency market data with onchain cryptographic verification, used by PriceManager for price transmission
CoW Protocol Documentation - Meta-DEX aggregation protocol using trade intents and batch auctions, GPv2Settlement contract reference for EIP-1271 isValidSignature integration
CoW Protocol GPv2Settlement Contract Reference - Order structure (GPv2Order.Data), EIP-712 signing, ERC-1271 smart contract trading, solver permissions, settlement execution
Code4rena Competition Guidelines - Submission rules, disclosure policies, judging process
